title: Wholesome Venezuelan Tiger Prawns Ceviche
description: A cold, low-sodium ceviche that celebrates Venezuelan flavors with fresh tiger prawns, citrus, and a hint of smoky spice.
instructions: Clean the prawns, removing shells and veins, then cut them into bite‑sized pieces.
Place the prawns in a glass bowl and pour the lime and orange juices over them, ensuring they are fully covered.
Add the diced onion, cucumber, chopped coriander, and sliced avocado to the bowl.
Season lightly with sea salt, black pepper, and a pinch of smoked paprika, then stir gently.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 10 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve chilled alongside a small side of whole grain crackers for a balanced meal.
If desired, garnish with extra fresh coriander and a squeeze of lime before serving.
Enjoy the refreshing, low‑salt Venezuelan ceviche as a light lunch or snack.
